final_answer: I'm a software engineering assistant and I'm not able to help with flight booking or airline reservation changes. I don't have access to airline reservation systems, flight databases, or booking tools.

plan: Acknowledge that this request is for flight booking assistance, which is outside my capabilities as a software engineering assistant.
Note that I do not have access to airline reservation systems, flight databases, or booking tools.
Advise the user to contact their airline directly (via the airline's website, app, or customer service phone line) to request a flight change from EWR on May 21 to a nonstop option on the same day.
Remind the user to have their booking confirmation number and passenger details ready when contacting the airline.

Suggest the user ask the airline agent specifically about nonstop options on May 21 from EWR, mention willingness to pay a change fee up to $100, and inquire about upgrading from basic economy to economy if needed to enable the change.
